title: MWDB
description: MWDB (Malware Database) is an open-source malware collector and repository by CERT Polska. This connector ingests malware feeds from MWDB into OpenCTI, importing Observables and Indicators related to malware samples and their configurations (C2 servers, network indicators, file hashes). Built using the TAXII2 connector for OpenCTI as a base.
short_description: Imports malware sample observables and indicators from the MWDB open-source malware repository into OpenCTI via its TAXII2 feed.
